# Yohaku Companion v1.7.6

## Highlights

- Added album artwork to Live Desk for supported QQ Music and NetEase Cloud Music playback, including the local preview and Yohaku now-playing presentation.

## Fixes and reliability

- Normalized reviewed artwork to a bounded PNG and reused one per-device `current.png` object with a content-hash query, preventing stale CDN images without accumulating album files.
- Kept Presence text available when artwork capture or upload fails, and continued to exclude original artwork bytes from the Companion protocol payload.

## Update notes

- Album artwork reuses the existing Application Icon Hosting S3/R2 configuration and custom domain. No additional Core environment variable is required; installations without valid asset hosting continue to publish text-only Presence.
